items.title: Bank of America resets Amazon stock forecast
items.description: Amazon stock has lost about 7% year to date, at the time of writing, Friday afternoon, March 6, according to Yahoo Finance. Meanwhile, the SPDR S&P 500 index (SPY) is down about a little more than 1% in the same period. Alphabet (GOOGL) is down almost 5%.Microsoft (MSFT) is down 15%.Apple ...
